author: reyhandl
name: LoRA Exploration: Rank Scaling, Technical LoRA Tweaks, and Selective LoRA
blurb: Non-record exploration of learned adapters on random linear maps: rank scaling, technical LoRA ideas (rsLoRA, LoRA-GA, AdaLoRA, RandLoRA), and selective layer/type placement. Selective attention-only LoRA on layers 4-6 at val_bpb 1.2639 with reduced artifact size, trained on 1xH100 with 24 minutes.
